name: Spring Rolls (Great Chefs)
recipeIngredient: 2 oz Mushrooms, black, soaked in warm water
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the vegetable or peanut oil in a wok until hot.
2. Add the pork and brown it.
3. Add garlic, ginger, bamboo shoots, black mushrooms, and cabbage. Cook and toss with half of the wine, light soy sauce, and sesame oil.
4. Add boiling chicken broth. Cover and simmer for 30 seconds.
5. In a bowl, mix together salt, sesame oil, white pepper, cornstarch, oyster sauce, dark soy sauce, and add to the wok.
6. Cook and toss the mixture, then remove and cool.
7. Put a dab of the mixture on a spring roll skin; fold and seal it with beaten egg.
8. Deep fry the rolls in hot oil (365 F) until golden brown.
